package rulefixtures

// scenario for filter_then_count_then_iterate: Same collection traversed multiple times for filter, count, and process steps.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: hot_path; severity: info.
type Rule350NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario350Negative(records []Rule350NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
